images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful Japanese idol/influencer model, early 20s, with flawless yet realistic skin showing fine pores and a natural glow, large expressive almond eyes, a cute yet seductive face, and straight silky black hair falling over exposed collarbones. She wears an oversized boyfriend shirt—soft ivory cotton, sheer lace trim, unbuttoned at the neck to reveal a glimpse of a skin‑toned camisole and the gentle curve of her ample chest—paired with high‑waisted denim shorts that hug her slim waist and flare over toned thighs. She stands inside a vintage telephone booth bathed in bright disco‑ball reflections, pastel‑pink and mint‑green panels glittering with global illumination; a shallow depth of field blurs the surrounding café patrons while spotlighting her shy smile as she glances down, lips slightly parted. Lighting: a soft, even glow from the mirrored ball, no harsh shadows; pastel, airy color grade; shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced highlights, cinematic bokeh, ultra‑detailed texture.8k photo, Large breasts
